coupon.source_phrase_block: PLEASE NOTE: This is an electronic pass that you will receive in your email. You may then use the code on the pass to purchase advance tickets online or same-day tickets at the museum. Children 6 and under are free. Each pass allows 2 adults for $15 each (special exhibition + general admission) and up to 4 children 7 – 17 $10 each (special exhibition + general admission) children ages 0-6 are free.
